title: VS Crumbles
description: An addon for Valkyrien Skies which lets detached parts of your ship fall off.
body:
Small ish mod which aims to make blasting other ships with [cannonballs](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-pirates) more fun. 

Now when part of a ship up to a configurable block limit becomes detached, it turns into falling blocks (like vanilla sand). This gets rid of the annoying floating blocks that are created when trying to blow up or burn down your enemies' ships, and makes sinking ships easier.

**Update 1.1:**
There is now a separate config option for Max Blocks to Crumble if a protected plock is present. By default, Ship Helms from VS: Eureka are protected.


I hope you enjoy :)


Also check out:
[Ship In A Bottle](https://modrinth.com/mod/vs-ship-in-a-bottle)
